meaning: 元山[朝鲜民主主义人民共和国东部港市]
examples: Songdowon international children's camp in Wonsan.
Around Wonsan city, more than 70% of residents survive on a corn porridge mixed with grass.
The regiment, under Colonel Dennis M. "Dinty" Moore, was to relieve Puller's 1st Marines in and around Wonsan.
The recent report of Mr. Kim at the hydroelectric station in Wonsan, for example, showed Mr. Kim looking at a painting of the complex.
For some North Koreans, the most exotic vacation possible is closer to home -- the coastal town of Wonsan, about 200 kilometers to the east of the capital.
